snapshot.manifestSelfDigestPolicy: DELIVERY_MANIFEST.json is intentionally not listed in files because a file cannot contain its own final SHA-256 without a recursive self-reference. Every other snapshot file is listed; the final archive SHA-256 is provided in the external companion file.

postDeliveryHotfixes.reason: React 19 EffectCallback cleanup must return void; Map.delete returns boolean when used as an expression-bodied cleanup.
postDeliveryHotfixes.change: Wrap planetObjects.current.delete(moon.id) in a block-bodied cleanup so the destructor returns void.
postDeliveryHotfixes.behavioralScope: Registry cleanup only; no ephemeris, orbit, visual profile, asset, or UI behavior changed.
